seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Fable generates infinite procedurally generated VHS-style Backrooms footage using raw numpy for 3D rendering, PIL/scipy post-processing, and ffmpeg output; plans include seed cycling every 120s and rarity-based features for long-running screensavers.

Demonstrates 'brain surgery' interventions to alter model reasoning midstream and the model's ability to detect such interventions, providing evidence of causal understanding beyond correlation and prompted eval awareness.

seed_expert_discoveries.project: Fable 5 Max Mode / Abacus AI agent
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Prompt-based agent builds complex SaaS apps, custom workflows, iOS/Android apps, and always-on trading servers with full backend (servers, storage, DB, checkpointing) included; outperforms Opus 4.8 + GPT 5.5 on some tasks.
Agents can autonomously explore multiple codebases, set up working copies, test features/flags, and update docs overnight, enabling true delegation of complex engineering tasks.
OpenWiki (nearly 7k GitHub stars in <1 week) and related frameworks explore wikis as shared memory abstractions for agents vs humans; emergency webinar on practical implementation.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Fable excels at planning/review while cheaper models (Sonnet/Opus) handle execution; reusable CLAUDE.md skills, handoff patterns, and usage caps enable 10x cost reduction for production workflows.
Independent validator network for resolving AI agent disputes in high-stakes economies (projected $9T by 2030); focuses on payments, identity, and interoperability when agents disagree.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Agents need on-chain wallets for real autonomy (trading, prediction markets) beyond chatbots; partnership enables gasless execution.
near_misses.reason: Lower signal; promotional rather than deep technical innovation or benchmark.

notes: Fable 5 dominates recent discussion as a high-capability agentic coding/model tool. Seed experts provided the strongest technical signals on architectures, memory, and interventions. Global search yielded mostly Fable chatter; filtered to max 6 high-signal items total.
